MBSF Base A/B/C/D and the new V2 files. The current MBSF Base A/B/C/D file will no longer be produced starting with annual 2024 data. For more detailed information about the MBSF data and enhancements, reference the CCW Medicare Administrative Data User Guide and Codebook.
Four additional segments are available for order with this file:
Chronic Conditions
Other Chronic Conditions
Cost and Use
National Death Index (NDI)
